name: C2xGetTokenInt
title: C2xGetTokenInt
syntax: long C2xGetTokenInt( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[] ); // form 1
long C2xGetTokenInt( long packet, char protocolDesignatorl[], char tokenDesignator[], long byteOffset, long length, long networkByteOrder ); // form 2
description: This function requests the integer value of a token.
Form 2 with byte offset returns a part of the token data as integer.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the protocol, e.g. geo_cnh

parameters.name: tokenDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the token, e.g. lpvSpeed

parameters.name: byteOffset
parameters.description: Offset from the beginning of the token in byte

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: Length of the integer value, must be 1, 2, 3 or 4 byte

return: With C2xGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.

description: Node System - PreStart in CAPL Browser
Node Callback Function in CAPL Browser

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
